ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the event occurs */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., DONE, SCHEDULED) */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host responsible for the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is held */,
  "estimated_attendance" INTEGER /* Estimated number of attendees */,
  "actual_attendance" INTEGER /* Actual number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., tournament, match, practice) */,
  "ticket_sales" REAL /* Total ticket sales for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host organization or individual */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the host */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the host */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the host */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the host's role or responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "venue_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the venue */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the venue */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the venue for future events */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the venue */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last inspection date for safety and maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division or category of the team */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the team manager */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home venue */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_home_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_teams" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team participating in the event */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the team in the event (e.g., participant, referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which the team is registered */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registered team */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the team registered for the event */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, cancelled) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action took place */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* More details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Event Coordinator, Manager) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the staff member */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member joined the organization */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member left the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which tickets are sold */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the ticket sale */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., general admission, VIP) */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., sold, reserved, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the participant */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the notification */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, scheduled) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
